title: WATCH:  Erika Kirk attends State of the Union as Trump pays tribute to Charlie Kirk
fullText: Erika Kirk attends State of the Union as Trump pays tribute to Charlie KirkPresident Trump paid tribute to Charlie Kirk as he welcomed his widow, Erika Kirk, during the State of the Union address, urging Americans to reject political violence of any kind.February 24, 2026
summary: President Trump paid tribute to Charlie Kirk as he welcomed his widow, Erika Kirk, during the State of the Union address, urging Americans to reject political violence of any kind.
